creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jan 19 03:06:56 2013
New Revision: 310632
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310632

Log:
  - Update to 0.13
  - Add LICENSE (ART10 and GPLv1)
  - Dependency fix
  - Give maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/175393
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 02:33:54 2013	(r310631)
+++ head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:06:56 2013	(r310632)
@@ -2,19 +2,29 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Template-Provider-FromDATA
-PORTVERSION=	0.12
+PORTVERSION=	0.13
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	Load templates from your __DATA__ section
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Template-Toolkit>=2:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Template-Toolkit>=2.15:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit \
 		p5-Class-Accessor>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-MAN3=		Template::Provider::FromDATA.3
+MAN3=	Template::Provider::FromDATA.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 501502
+BUILD_DEPENDS+=	p5-ExtUtils-MakeMaker>=6.59:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-ExtUtils-MakeMaker
+.endif
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/distinfo	Sat Jan 19 02:33:54 2013	(r310631)
+++ head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/distinfo	Sat Jan 19 03:06:56 2013	(r310632)

-SIZE (Template-Provider-FromDATA-0.12.tar.gz) = 22742
+SHA256 (Template-Provider-FromDATA-0.13.tar.gz) = 0d4b9aa86ee6fddac15e54fd556d57539a02f1c5cf451011c3faf6306ae0401c
+SIZE (Template-Provider-FromDATA-0.13.tar.gz) = 23278

Modified: head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 19 02:33:54 2013	(r310631)
+++ head/www/p5-Template-Provider-FromDATA/pkg-plist	Sat Jan 19 03:06:56 2013	(r310632)
@@ -2,6 +2,6 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/Template/Provider/FromDATA.pm
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Template/Provider
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/Template
-@dirrm  %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Template/Provider/FromDATA
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Template/Provider/FromDATA
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Template/Provider
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Template
